title: How to Never Hit Your Claude Session Limit Again

extracted.hook: If you use Claude, this video is going to save you money today.

accelerates: when explaining token compaction and manual vs. auto
slows: during detailed explanations of token usage and context rot

extracted.vulnerability: "I do think that there's an argument to be made about the fact that if you leave stuff like that, it's able to read through and it's able to learn and it's able to not make the same mistake again"

transitions: So, let's get back to the video.
